name: pickleball-bay-area
description: Bay Area pickleball courts directory (static site, Firebase Hosting). Node scripts: .mjs = ES modules, .js = CommonJS (do not add "type":"module").

scripts.check: node scripts/validate.mjs && node scripts/check-venue-cards.mjs && node scripts/check-redesign-invariants.mjs && node scripts/hash-modules.mjs --check
